unexpected_finds.type: Log-stratum hit at ratio not previously catalogued
unexpected_finds.comment: These two families produce L = +/-2/log(2) exactly. The PCF a_n = -n^2, b_n = 6n+/-3 is recognisable as a classical-style Bauer/Stern continued fraction for 2/log 2. Not a counterexample to the Trans-stratum -2/9 conjecture (Log != Trans), but extends the catalog of known Log-stratum ratios beyond -2/9. Note: indicial discriminant 8/9 is NOT a rational square, meaning indicial roots {(1+/-sqrt(8/9))/2} are irrational; nevertheless a clean Log-class identity exists. This challenges the heuristic that rational indicial roots are necessary for Log-stratum membership.
unexpected_finds.context: T2B-F25-FALSIFICATION found 12 Log families at ratio -2/9 in F(2,5). This session adds Log at ratio -1/36 with irrational indicial roots.
